description: A perfect footwear for the winter, this black suede boot from carlton london is a great addition to your stylish winter wardrobe. With a faux wool inner lining and footbed, it's the best of warm comfort your can ever gift your legs.UpperSuede upper with a long mouth Faux wool insulation on the inside and footbedOutsoleTPR outsole with herringbone lugs for absolute grip and tractionshoe careUse a suede brush to clean the upperDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
